arts.ttl: Arsenal explain Riccardo Calafiori absence from Man United clash as Tottenham fear emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are without Riccardo Calafiori for Sunday's FA Cup clash with Manchester United due to a muscle injury, the Gunners confirm.

arts.ttl: Why Amad is on the bench for Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Amad is a surprise absentee from the starting XI for Man United's clash with Arsenal in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Manchester United: FA Cup third round – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 3pm GMT kick-off at the Emirates Get in touch! Share your thoughts in an email to Simon Follow Tamworth v Tottenham in extra time Mikel Arteta says Riccardo Califouri “had a light problem yesterday in training”, hence his absence this afternoon. “We thought about the best possible line-up, and we wanted to try and be better than Manchester United. We have a lot of games, and it is going to be an interesting week. Bearing this in mind, we believe this is the best squad to start.” John Brewin is watching the ongoing Tamworth v Tottenham tie, now with just a couple of minutes, some stoppage time and potentially extra time to play, and still 0-0! arts.ttl: Man Utd try to hijack ‘best centre back in Europe’
arts.sum: The 25-year-old has a long history of injuries which complicates the chances of him signing a new deal at Barca. But United have now entered the race themselves as they also plan to sign a centre back for new manager Ruben Amorim.
